summary: Two incident summary sheets from a declassified series document ground observations: one near Keithsburg, Iowa on 15 Sept 1948 describing a small metallic disc-shaped object viewed through binoculars drifting south, and another in Ascension Parish, Louisiana on 1 Oct 1948 describing a witness with flying experience observing a cone-shaped, white-hot object flying east in level flight without sound or trail.
